GENERAL.name: General
GENERAL.description: Routine unclassified content with no special controls.

CUI.name: Controlled Unclassified Information
CUI.description: Information requiring safeguarding per U.S. law, regulation, or government policy.
CUI.handling: Mark clearly as CUI. Enforce access restrictions.

CUI.name: Controlled Unclassified Information
CUI.description: Baseline CUI. Represents information subject to safeguarding controls per law, regulation, or policy.
CUI.handling: Must be stored, transmitted, and shared only with authorized users.

CUI//LEI.name: Law Enforcement Information
CUI//LEI.description: Information related to law enforcement activities, investigations, operations, and sensitive records.
CUI//LEI.handling: Restrict to law enforcement personnel with a need to know.

CUI//LEI/AIV.name: Accident Investigation
CUI//LEI/AIV.description: Accident investigation records protected from premature disclosure.

CUI//PRIVACY.name: General Privacy
CUI//PRIVACY.description: Personally identifiable information requiring protection from unauthorized disclosure.
CUI//PRIVACY.handling: Encrypt in transit and at rest. Prevent unnecessary distribution.
